name: smoke-en
notes: Committed, PHI-FREE smoke set: the synthetic 2-speaker conversation.wav produced by make_sample.sh (macOS 'say' voices). Ground truth is the exact script in make_sample.sh, so this manifest works on a fresh clone after `bash make_sample.sh`. It verifies the harness end-to-end WITHOUT any private audio. The REAL Turkish clinical reference set lives git-ignored under eval/data/ + its own manifest (eval/manifests/clinical-tr.json, not committed).

turns.speaker: Speaker 1
turns.text: Hello, and welcome to the meeting. Today we will discuss the new project.

turns.speaker: Speaker 2
turns.text: Thank you. I am really looking forward to getting started.

turns.speaker: Speaker 1
turns.text: I agree. So what do you think about the budget?

turns.speaker: Speaker 2
turns.text: I think the budget is sufficient, but we should clarify the timeline a bit more.

turns.speaker: Speaker 1
turns.text: Great, then we can start next week. Thank you very much.

turns.speaker: Speaker 2
turns.text: Thank you as well. See you later, and have a good day.
